name: Cantaloupe Bread
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Cantaloupe, ripe, diced into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions: Make Cantaloupe liquid in a blender from approximately 1 1/2 cups of seeded and peeled ripe cantaloupe chunks, then heated. Place all ingredients into the pan in the order listed, set darkness control at 10 o'clock, select white bread, and push "Start." This is a soft, sticky dough. If any of it clings to the sides of the pan at the end of the first kneading, you can gently press it down with a rubber spatula. This unbelievably delicious bread is based on an equally unbelievable Texas treat consisting of peeled cantaloupe segments arranged on a serving plate in a sunburst pattern with bread cubes piled in the center and covered with cream sauce, then dusted with paprika and/or dotted with red jelly. You can spread your own jelly on these slices, perhaps over a layer of whipped cream cheese mashed with diced cantaloupe, to savor the full range of often tantalizing flavors.
